docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-28-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT CONNIE MOCK NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2008 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BENNETT, RUFUS AS TO DEFENDANT MOCK, CONNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-27-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MOCK, CONNIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENNETT, RUFUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOCK, CONNIE $4,930.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, DEFENDANT CONNIE MOCK NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
